member.name: P:Secs4Net.ISecsConnection.State
member.summary: Connection state

member.name: P:Secs4Net.ISecsConnection.IsActive
member.summary: Is Active or Passive mode

member.name: P:Secs4Net.ISecsConnection.IpAddress
member.summary: When is the IP address will be treated remote device's IP address, opposite the connection will bind on this IP address as Passive mode.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.ISecsConnection.Port
member.summary: When is the port number will be treated remote device's TCP port number, opposite the connection will bind on the port number as Passive mode.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.ISecsConnection.DeviceIpAddress
member.summary:
Remote device's IP address.
In Active mode, it is the same as IPAddress property
In Passive mode, remote IP Address can be resolved successfully only when is or , otherwise, return "N/A"

member.name: M:Secs4Net.Item.EncodeTo(System.Buffers.IBufferWriter{System.Byte})
member.summary: Encode the item to SECS binary format

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Item.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Indexer of List items. Be careful of setter operation. Since the original slot will be overridden. So, it has no chance to be Disposed along with the List's Dispose method. You can invoke method on the original item by yourself or till the GC collects it.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Item.Items
member.summary: Get List's sub-items

member.name: M:Secs4Net.Item.FirstValue``1
member.summary: Get the first element of item array value
member.exception: When item is empty or data length less than sizeof()
when the item's is or or

member.name: M:Secs4Net.Item.FirstValueOrDefault``1(``0)
member.summary: Get the first element of item array value

member.name: M:Secs4Net.Item.GetMemory``1
member.summary: Get item array as

member.name: M:Secs4Net.Item.GetString
member.summary: Get item string value

member.name: M:Secs4Net.Item.EncodeItemHeader(Secs4Net.SecsFormat,System.Int32,System.Buffers.IBufferWriter{System.Byte})
member.summary: Encode Item header
member.param: List item count or value bytes length

member.name: M:Secs4Net.PrimaryMessageWrapper.TryReplyAsync(Secs4Net.SecsMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: If the message has already replied, method will return false.
member.param: Reply S9F7 if parameter is null

member.name: T:Secs4Net.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.S9F1
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unrecognized Device Id.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.S9F11
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Data Too Long.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.S9F13
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Conversation Timeout.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.S9F3
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unrecognized Stream Type.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.S9F5
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unrecognized Function Type.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.S9F7
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Illegal Data.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.S9F9
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Transaction Timer Timeout.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.S9Fy
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to S9Fy message reply..

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.SecsMessageStreamNumberMustLessThan127
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Stream number must be less than 127.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.SxF0
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Equipment is not online mode.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.Resources.T3Timeout
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to T3 Timeout!.

member.name: M:Secs4Net.ISecsGem.GetPrimaryMessageAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get primary messages from async-stream

member.name: M:Secs4Net.ISecsGem.SendAsync(Secs4Net.SecsMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a message to device asynchronously and get reply message.
member.returns: Secondary message, or null if 's is

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsGemOptions.IsActive
member.summary: Configure connection as Active or Passive mode.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsGemOptions.IpAddress
member.summary: When is the IP address will be treated remote device's IP address, opposite the connection will bind on this IP address as Passive mode. Default value is "127.0.0.1".

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsGemOptions.Port
member.summary: When is the port number will be treated remote device's TCP port number, opposite the connection will bind on the port number as Passive mode. Default value is 5000.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsGemOptions.T3
member.summary: Configure the timeout interval in milliseconds between the primary message sent till to receive the secondary message. Default value is 45000 milliseconds.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsGemOptions.T5
member.summary: Configure the timeout interval in milliseconds between the connection state transition from to . Default value is 10000 milliseconds.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsGemOptions.T6
member.summary: Configure the timeout interval in milliseconds between the control message sent till to receive the reply message. Default value is 5000 milliseconds.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsGemOptions.T7
member.summary: Configure the timeout interval in milliseconds between the connection state transition from to . Default value is 10000 milliseconds.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsGemOptions.T8
member.summary: Configure the timeout interval in milliseconds between the chunk received to next chunk during decoding a . Default value is 5000 milliseconds.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsGemOptions.LinkTestInterval
member.summary: Configure the timer interval in milliseconds between each request. Default value is 60000.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsGemOptions.SocketReceiveBufferSize
member.summary: Configure a value that specifies the size of the receive buffer of the System.Net.Sockets.Socket. Default value is 8192 bytes.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsGemOptions.EncodeBufferInitialSize
member.summary: Configure the initial buffer size in bytes for the encoding. Default value is 4096 bytes.

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsMessage.S
member.summary: message stream number

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsMessage.F
member.summary: message function number

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsMessage.ReplyExpected
member.summary: expect reply message

member.name: P:Secs4Net.SecsMessage.SecsItem
member.summary: the root item of message

member.name: M:Secs4Net.SecsMessage.#ctor(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Boolean)
member.summary: constructor of SecsMessage
